findings.message: Test file webview-ui/src/components/chat/__tests__/BatchListFilesPermission.spec.tsx was modified but no source file changed in this PR. If the PR claims to fix a failing test, the change likely edits the test rather than the failing implementation.

pr.title: Remove roocode.com web app
pr.body:
## Summary
- Remove the `apps/web-roo-code` Next.js app, public assets, content, and config
- Remove website deploy and preview workflows that referenced the deleted app
- Regenerate `pnpm-lock.yaml` and remove stale `knip` ignore entry
- Rename a webview test fixture path so no deleted app references remain

## Tests
- `pnpm check-types`
- `pnpm lint`
- `pnpm --filter @roo-code/vscode-webview exec vitest run src/components/chat/__tests__/BatchListFilesPermission.spec.tsx`
- pre-commit lint hook
- pre-push check-types hook

Note: local commands reported the existing Node engine warning because this shell is on Node 20.18.1 while the repo requests 20.19.2.

<!-- roo-code-cloud-preview-start -->
[Interactively review PR in Roo Code Cloud](https://app.roocode.com/preview?repo=RooCodeInc%2FRoo-Code&sha=87eac079921c4b013f13676f2a6b255645ab0fae&pr=12375&branch=codex%2Fremove-web-roo-code-app)
<!-- roo-code-cloud-preview-end -->
pr.author: mrubens
